commands: Incorporate a strategy to handle data skewness, such as using adaptive sorting techniques or implementing a more robust partitioning method to ensure balanced sorting across different data segments.
Enhance the locking mechanism to include versioning or timestamping to better manage concurrent updates and reduce the likelihood of conflicts, ensuring that updates do not block read operations.

Consider implementing additional search structures, such as tries or suffix trees, alongside hash tables and B-trees for better handling of partial matches and prefix searches, which can improve search efficiency.
